basic_details.job_title: NIPER Raebareli Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education & Research Raebareli
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education & Research Raebareli (NIPER Raebareli) Technical Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 29 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the NIPER Raebareli Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B. Pharm with First Division from recognized institute/University.
qualification.details: B. Pharm with First Division from a recognized institute/University. Three years of experience in handling sophisticated instruments and facilities.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download NIPER Raebareli Technical Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIPER Raebareli Technical Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the NIPER Raebareli Technical Assistant positions is 21st June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B. Pharm degree with First Division from a recognized institute or university, along with three years of experience in handling sophisticated instruments and facilities.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Technical Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Technical Assistant post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Technical Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Technical Assistant position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 27,000.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the Technical Assistant post at NIPER Raebareli.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for this recruitment must be submitted via email.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the NIPER Raebareli Technical Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Technical Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Technical Assistant position involves a screening followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is NIPER-R/CoE/Contractual Advt./2026-27/01.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NIPER Raebareli located?
faq.answer: NIPER Raebareli is located in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 226002.
